hooks.command: CORE=$(find ~/.claude/plugins/cache -path '*/alhazen-core/*/alhazen_core.py' 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$CORE" ]; then echo 'alhazen-core plugin required. Run: /plugin install alhazen-core@skillful-alhazen' && exit 1; fi; CORE_DIR=$(dirname "$CORE"); GM="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/mythras-gm"; uv run --project "$CORE_DIR" python "$CORE" init && uv run --project "$CORE_DIR" python "$CORE" load-schema "$GM/schema.tql" && uv run --project "$GM" python "$GM/mythras_gm.py" load-rules >/dev/null
